# Fixture Manifest

Every file in the fixture pack is synthetic and safe to share.

|file|format|purpose|columns|edge_cases|expected_app_behavior|priority|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|01_happy_path/clean_integrated_scm.csv|CSV|Clean integrated SCM upload with all major fields for dashboard smoke tests.|order_id, order_date, ship_date, demand_date, sku, product, category, customer_id, customer, region, supplier_id, supplier, warehouse_id, warehouse, inventory_qty, demand_qty, sales_qty, forecast_qty, unit_price, unit_cost, revenue, cogs, po_id, order_qty, received_qty, defect_qty, lead_time_days, promised_delivery_date, actual_delivery_date, shipment_id, carrier, route, origin, destination, shipment_status, freight_cost, weight_kg, volume_cbm, distance_miles, incoterm, currency, production_qty, planned_production_qty, good_qty, scrap_qty, capacity_hours, max_capacity_hours, downtime_hours, receipt_date, last_movement_date|None; consistent ISO dates, numeric columns, complete keys.|Load without warnings; auto-map standard fields; compute all core KPIs.|P0|
|01_happy_path/full_integrated_dataset.csv|CSV|Full integrated dataset spanning demand, inventory, procurement, logistics, warehouse, production, and cost.|order_id, order_date, ship_date, demand_date, sku, product, category, customer_id, customer, region, supplier_id, supplier, warehouse_id, warehouse, inventory_qty, demand_qty, sales_qty, forecast_qty, unit_price, unit_cost, revenue, cogs, po_id, order_qty, received_qty, defect_qty, lead_time_days, promised_delivery_date, actual_delivery_date, shipment_id, carrier, route, origin, destination, shipment_status, freight_cost, weight_kg, volume_cbm, distance_miles, incoterm, currency, production_qty, planned_production_qty, good_qty, scrap_qty, capacity_hours, max_capacity_hours, downtime_hours, receipt_date, last_movement_date|Unicode customer value; varied late shipments, defects, stock levels.|Load successfully; dashboards can join dimensions and calculate KPIs.|P0|
|01_happy_path/clean_multisheet_scm.xlsx|XLSX|Clean multi-sheet workbook for Excel ingestion and cross-sheet joins.|Orders, Demand, Inventory, Procurement, Shipments, Production sheet schemas|Multiple sheets; one Unicode customer name.|Detect sheets; allow sheet selection; preserve numeric/date parsing; calculate module KPIs.|P0|
|02_file_formats/clean_csv_upload.csv|CSV|Basic CSV upload parser fixture.|order_id, order_date, ship_date, demand_date, sku, product, category, customer_id, customer, region, supplier_id, supplier, warehouse_id, warehouse, inventory_qty, demand_qty, sales_qty, forecast_qty, unit_price, unit_cost, revenue, cogs, po_id, order_qty, received_qty, defect_qty, lead_time_days, promised_delivery_date, actual_delivery_date, shipment_id, carrier, route, origin, destination, shipment_status, freight_cost, weight_kg, volume_cbm, distance_miles, incoterm, currency, production_qty, planned_production_qty, good_qty, scrap_qty, capacity_hours, max_capacity_hours, downtime_hours, receipt_date, last_movement_date|No edge cases.|CSV parser reads all rows and standard columns.|P0|
|02_file_formats/legacy_xls_upload.xls|XLS|Legacy Excel 2 BIFF .xls fixture for old-format upload coverage.|order_id, order_date, ship_date, demand_date, sku, product, category, customer_id, customer, region, supplier_id, supplier|True binary BIFF2 workbook; single sheet.|Accept if legacy XLS supported; otherwise return clear unsupported-engine validation message.|P1|
|02_file_formats/multi_sheet_workbook.xlsx|XLSX|Generic multi-sheet workbook with relevant and readme sheet.|Demand, Inventory, Suppliers, Readme|Irrelevant Readme sheet.|List sheets; ignore or let user skip non-data sheet.|P0|
|02_file_formats/empty_sheet_workbook.xlsx|XLSX|Workbook with one empty sheet and one valid sheet.|EmptySheet has no columns; ValidDemand has demand schema|Completely empty sheet.|Warn/skip empty sheet; load valid sheet.|P1|
|02_file_formats/header_only_sheet.xlsx|XLSX|Header-only sheet to validate no-data handling.|HeaderOnly demand headers only|Header-only no data rows.|Warn no data rows; do not crash; load other sheets.|P1|
|02_file_formats/irrelevant_sheets.xlsx|XLSX|Workbook with irrelevant cover/notes sheets plus useful data sheet.|Cover, Notes, Demand_Data|Non-tabular sheets.|Auto-detect likely data sheet; allow manual sheet choice.|P1|
|02_file_formats/merged_header_like_issues.xlsx|XLSX|Workbook with report title and merged-header-like first rows before actual header.|Actual headers begin on row 3: SKU, Product, Demand Qty, Forecast Qty|Merged title range; pre-header rows.|Prompt/select header row or infer row 3; do not treat title row as schema.|P2|
|03_data_cleaning/missing_duplicate_space_case.csv|CSV|Data cleaning fixture for missing values, duplicates, whitespace, casing, invalid dates.|order_id, sku, product, customer, order_date, qty, unit_price, currency|Duplicate order_id; spaces; mixed casing; blank customer/currency; invalid dates; invalid qty token.|Trim strings; normalize casing where configured; detect duplicates and invalid required fields.|P0|
|03_data_cleaning/mixed_dates_numbers_currency.csv|CSV|Cleans mixed date formats, currency strings, percentage strings, thousands separators, parentheses negatives.|date, sku, qty, unit_cost, margin_pct, variance|Mixed date formats; currency symbols; invalid percentage and numeric token.|Parse valid dates/numbers; flag impossible values and invalid tokens.|P0|
|03_data_cleaning/invalid_numeric_tokens.csv|CSV|Invalid numeric token coverage.|sku, inventory_qty, unit_cost, demand_qty|Text in numeric fields; infinity; overflow; NaN strings.|Coerce safe values; report invalid numeric tokens; avoid divide-by-zero errors.|P1|
|03_data_cleaning/blank_required_fields.csv|CSV|Blank required field validation fixture.|date, sku, product, demand_qty, forecast_qty|Blank SKU/date/product/demand fields.|Fail validation-only for required field rules with row-level messages.|P0|
|04_mapping/standard_columns.csv|CSV|Standard column names for auto-mapping baseline.|date, sku, product, customer, region, demand_qty, sales_qty, forecast_qty|None.|Auto-map all fields with high confidence.|P0|
|04_mapping/synonym_columns.csv|CSV|Synonym headers for mapper.|Order Date, Item Code, Item Name, Client, Territory, Actual Demand, Units Sold, Fcst|Business synonyms for date/SKU/customer/forecast.|Auto-map using synonym dictionary; show confidence.|P0|
|04_mapping/snake_camel_spaced_headers.csv|CSV|Snake_case, camelCase, and spaced header variants.|orderDate, sku_code, Product Name, customerName, sales_qty, Forecast Qty|Mixed naming conventions.|Normalize headers and map equivalent fields.|P1|
|04_mapping/missing_required_module_fields.csv|CSV|Missing required module field fixture.|date, product, customer, demand_qty|Missing SKU for demand module.|Block demand dashboard until required SKU mapping supplied.|P0|
|04_mapping/extra_irrelevant_columns.csv|CSV|Extra irrelevant columns coverage.|date, sku, product, demand_qty, forecast_qty, favorite_color, internal_comment|Irrelevant non-SCM columns.|Load core fields and ignore/store extra columns as metadata.|P2|
|04_mapping/duplicate_ambiguous_headers.csv|CSV|Duplicate/ambiguous headers for manual mapper.|date, sku, sku, product, qty, quantity, forecast|Duplicate sku header; qty vs quantity ambiguity.|Require manual mapping or disambiguation; no silent incorrect mapping.|P0|
|04_mapping/invalid_mapping_scenario.csv|CSV|Invalid mapping scenario with insufficient fields.|date, supplier, carrier, notes|Cannot satisfy any module required fields.|Return mapping error; validation-only exits non-zero/expected error code.|P0|
|04_mapping/mapping_template.json|JSON|Manual/auto mapping template for CLI and UI mapping tests.|JSON: template_name, version, modules|Synonym arrays; module required fields.|Import mapping template and apply to fixtures.|P0|
|05_demand_forecasting/seasonal_demand.csv|CSV|Seasonal demand and forecasting data.|date, sku, product, customer, region, demand_qty, sales_qty, forecast_qty|seasonal pattern; actual vs forecast; MAPE/WAPE/bias-ready.|Forecasting dashboard calculates WAPE, MAPE where valid, bias, tracking signal.|P0|
|05_demand_forecasting/sparse_demand.csv|CSV|Sparse demand and forecasting data.|date, sku, product, customer, region, demand_qty, sales_qty, forecast_qty|sparse pattern; actual vs forecast; MAPE/WAPE/bias-ready.|Forecasting dashboard calculates WAPE, MAPE where valid, bias, tracking signal.|P1|
|05_demand_forecasting/volatile_demand_forecast_bias.csv|CSV|Volatile demand and forecasting data.|date, sku, product, customer, region, demand_qty, sales_qty, forecast_qty|volatile pattern; actual vs forecast; MAPE/WAPE/bias-ready.|Forecasting dashboard calculates WAPE, MAPE where valid, bias, tracking signal.|P0|
|05_demand_forecasting/actual_vs_forecast_metrics.csv|CSV|Small deterministic actual-vs-forecast metrics file.|date, sku, product, customer, region, demand_qty, sales_qty, forecast_qty|Includes one zero-actual row for MAPE exclusion/divide-by-zero handling.|Calculate WAPE over all actual demand; MAPE excludes zero actual or reports NA by config.|P0|
|06_inventory/inventory_risk_abc_xyz.csv|CSV|Inventory risk, ABC/XYZ, safety stock, reorder point fixture.|sku, product, warehouse_id, inventory_qty, unit_cost, avg_daily_demand, lead_time_days, safety_stock, reorder_point, abc_class, xyz_class, risk_flag|Stockout, overstock, dead stock, slow moving risk flags.|Classify inventory; calculate safety stock/ROP and risk dashboards.|P0|
|06_inventory/inventory_aging_lots.csv|CSV|Lot/batch inventory aging fixture.|lot_id, sku, product, warehouse_id, batch_qty, receipt_date, last_movement_date, expiry_date, unit_cost|Old lots, last movement dates, expiry dates.|Calculate age buckets, slow/dead stock, expiry exposure.|P0|
|06_inventory/stockout_overstock_slow_dead.csv|CSV|Focused stockout/overstock/slow/dead stock cases.|sku, product, warehouse_id, inventory_qty, unit_cost, avg_daily_demand, lead_time_days, safety_stock, reorder_point, abc_class, xyz_class, risk_flag|Explicit risk_flag labels.|Validate risk categorization output against labels.|P1|
|07_procurement_suppliers/procurement_pos_supplier_scorecard.csv|CSV|Supplier scorecard and PO procurement fixture.|po_id, supplier_id, supplier, sku, product, order_date, due_date, received_date, po_status, order_qty, received_qty, contract_price, standard_price, actual_price, purchase_price_variance, off_contract_flag, defect_qty|Open/closed/late/cancelled statuses; PPV; off-contract; defects.|Calculate supplier OTD, lead time, defect rate, PPV, off-contract spend.|P0|
|07_procurement_suppliers/po_aging_statuses.csv|CSV|Open PO aging fixture anchored to 2026-05-11.|po_id, supplier, sku, order_date, due_date, received_date, po_status, open_qty, po_age_days|Open and late POs across age buckets.|Bucket open PO ages and flag overdue rows.|P0|
|07_procurement_suppliers/off_contract_ppv.csv|CSV|Off-contract spend and PPV fixture.|po_id, supplier_id, supplier, sku, product, order_date, due_date, received_date, po_status, order_qty, received_qty, contract_price, standard_price, actual_price, purchase_price_variance, off_contract_flag, defect_qty|Off-contract flags; favorable/unfavorable variance.|Calculate PPV and off-contract spend by supplier/SKU.|P1|
|08_logistics_transportation/shipments_carrier_lane.csv|CSV|Carrier/lane logistics fixture.|shipment_id, carrier, route, origin, destination, promised_date, delivery_date, shipment_status, freight_cost, weight_kg, volume_cbm, distance_miles, cost_per_kg, cost_per_mile, late_flag, incoterm, currency|Late shipments; status variation; cost per kg/mile; incoterm/currency.|Calculate carrier OTD, lane cost, late shipments, freight KPIs.|P0|
|08_logistics_transportation/incoterm_currency_mixed.csv|CSV|Incoterm and mixed-currency transportation fixture.|shipment_id, carrier, route, incoterm, currency, freight_cost, weight_kg, volume_cbm, distance_miles|Mixed BDT/USD/EUR currency values.|Require currency normalization or warn when no exchange table supplied.|P1|
|09_warehouse/warehouse_ops_sla_cycle_count.csv|CSV|Warehouse productivity/SLA/cycle count fixture.|warehouse_id, warehouse, location, sku, inbound_qty, outbound_qty, space_used_cbm, space_capacity_cbm, picks, accurate_picks, dock_start, dock_end, putaway_minutes, pick_start, pick_end, worker_team, sla_breach_flag, cycle_count_qty, system_qty|Dock/putaway/pick timestamps; SLA breach flags; cycle count variances.|Calculate accuracy, productivity, SLA breaches, stock variance.|P0|
